productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Daypack Brown Backpack
description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your stuff in style with this Yogear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories and books, the bag is best suited for college and general heavy duty use. Height: 32 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 14 cm Made of 600D polyester One main compartment with zipper closure One small zippered compartment on the front for carrying small items Fabric haul loop Two adjustable shoulder straps with padding Wash care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
